reason: Successfully verified that agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username with proper account access flow
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent list in sidebar
Clicked the "QA-20260331-223202-ungb" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened with agent status showing "idle"
Verified agent status — Status confirmed as "idle" (meets requirement of "running" or "idle")
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted successfully and agent began processing
Waited for GitHub account access card — Card appeared requesting permission to grant GitHub account access
Selected GitHub account and clicked "Grant Access" — Access was granted and agent resumed processing
Granted permission for GitHub API request (GET /user) — API request was allowed to proceed
Waited for final response — Agent completed task in 45 seconds and provided response
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly stated "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took screenshot of final result — Screenshot captured showing complete conversation flow and final response with username
